election2026.note_bm: Tarikh belum diumumkan — penggal DUN berakhir Dis 2026, pilihan raya perlu diadakan menjelang akhir Feb 2027.
election2026.note_en: Date not yet announced — the assembly's term ends Dec 2026, so polls are due by late Feb 2027.

seat.issue_bm: ADUN Bemban dipecat daripada Bersatu dan kini duduk sebagai Bebas — gabungan yang memenangi kerusi ini pada 2021 sudah tidak wujud di sini
seat.issue_en: Bemban's assemblyman was expelled from Bersatu and now sits as an Independent — the coalition that won this seat in 2021 no longer exists here
seat.receipt_bm: Dilaporkan Bernama/FMT (2025); majoriti 2021 hanya 328 undi dalam pertandingan tiga penjuru.
seat.receipt_en: Reported by Bernama/FMT (2025); the 2021 majority was just 328 votes in a three-way fight.

seat.issue_bm: 26 daripada 106 lokasi berisiko banjir di Melaka berada di daerah Jasin — banjir Okt 2025 sekali lagi memindahkan keluarga di sini
seat.issue_en: 26 of Melaka's 106 flood-risk locations are in Jasin district — the Oct 2025 floods displaced families here again
seat.receipt_bm: Angka MTL/Bomba Melaka (Nov 2025) melalui Majlis Keselamatan Negara.
seat.receipt_en: MTL/Melaka Fire Dept figures (Nov 2025) via the National Security Council.

statewide.issue_bm: Politik Melaka runtuh sementara Melaka banjir. Kerajaan negeri tumbang DUA kali dalam beberapa tahun — 2018 melalui peralihan sokongan (2020), kemudian Okt 2021 apabila empat ADUN menarik sokongan, memaksa pilihan raya pergantian penggal yang menelan kos ~RM45 juta. Wakil yang anda undi keluar; anda yang bayar.
statewide.issue_en: Melaka's politics collapses while Melaka floods. The state government fell TWICE in a few years — the 2018 government toppled by defections (2020), then again in Oct 2021 when four assemblymen withdrew support, forcing a mid-term election that cost ~RM45 million. The reps you elected walked out; you paid the bill.
statewide.receipt_bm: The Star (3 Mac 2020): kerajaan PH Melaka tumbang selepas ADUN DAP & PKR lompat ke PN. Malay Mail (5 Okt 2021): DUN dibubarkan selepas empat ADUN tarik sokongan; PRN 20 Nov 2021 kos EC ~RM45 juta, keluar mengundi 65.85%. Norhizam Hassan Baktee (Pengkalan Batu) terlibat dalam KEDUA-DUA keruntuhan.
statewide.receipt_en: The Star (3 Mar 2020): the PH Melaka government fell after DAP & PKR reps defected to PN. Malay Mail (5 Oct 2021): the assembly was dissolved after four reps withdrew support; the 20 Nov 2021 snap election cost the EC ~RM45 million with 65.85% turnout. Norhizam Hassan Baktee (Pengkalan Batu) was in BOTH collapses.

statewide.issue_bm: Kawasan yang sama banjir setiap musim tengkujuh — 106 lokasi berisiko banjir dikenal pasti di Melaka pada Nov 2025, 26 daripadanya di Jasin sahaja. Jasin banjir DUA kali pada 2025 (Mac dan Okt). Persediaan negeri: bot, 4WD, penjana — merancang SEKITAR banjir, bukan menghentikannya. Simpanan air Melaka pula hanya ~5.2%, antara paling nipis di negara.
statewide.issue_en: The same areas flood every monsoon — 106 flood-risk locations identified in Melaka in Nov 2025, 26 of them in Jasin alone. Jasin flooded TWICE in 2025 (March and October). The state's readiness: boats, 4WDs, generators — planning AROUND floods, not stopping them. And Melaka's water reserve margin is just ~5.2%, among the thinnest in the country.
statewide.receipt_bm: The Star / MKN (11 Nov 2025): 106 lokasi berisiko banjir, 26 di Jasin. Malay Mail (7 Mac 2025): banjir Melaka puncak 330 mangsa, Jasin 264. AHA Centre (19 Okt 2025): Jasin banjir lagi. The Edge/BIMB (2025): margin simpanan air Melaka ~5.2%, bawah paras disyorkan 10-15%.
statewide.receipt_en: The Star / MKN (11 Nov 2025): 106 flood-risk locations, 26 in Jasin. Malay Mail (7 Mar 2025): Melaka floods peaked at 330 victims, Jasin 264. AHA Centre (19 Oct 2025): Jasin flooded again. The Edge/BIMB (2025): Melaka's water reserve margin ~5.2%, below the recommended 10-15%.

muda_stances.stance_bm: Luka Melaka ialah kerajaan yang tumbang di tengah penggal — 2020 dan sekali lagi Okt 2021 melalui peralihan sokongan ADUN. MUDA menyokong undang-undang anti-lompat parti (Perkara 49A, berkuat kuasa 2022) yang mengosongkan kerusi wakil yang melompat, dan pengasasnya Syed Saddiq sendiri mangsa 'Langkah Sheraton' 2020. Jawapan MUDA kepada ketakstabilan Melaka: wakil yang tidak boleh dibeli.
muda_stances.stance_en: Melaka's wound is governments that collapse mid-term — in 2020 and again in Oct 2021 through assemblymen switching sides. MUDA backs the anti-party-hopping law (Article 49A, in force 2022) that vacates a defector's seat, and its founder Syed Saddiq was himself a target of the 2020 'Sheraton Move'. MUDA's answer to Melaka's instability: representatives who can't be bought.

muda_stances.stance_bm: MUDA menuntut gaji minimum bermaruah — RM1,500 kolar biru dan RM2,500 kolar putih (berdasarkan anggaran gaji sara hidup Bank Negara 2019).
muda_stances.stance_en: MUDA demands a dignified minimum wage — RM1,500 blue-collar and RM2,500 white-collar (based on Bank Negara's 2019 living-wage estimates).

quotes.text: I'm proposing the government to increase the minimum wage to at least RM1,500 and for white-collar workers, the minimum should be RM2,500, according to estimates issued by Bank Negara Malaysia in 2019.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (ketika itu Presiden MUDA)

muda_stances.stance_bm: MUDA menentang dasar yang menggusur penghuni sedia ada: Syed Saddiq melabel Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar sebagai 'Akta Rampas Rumah' kerana ambang persetujuan diturunkan ke 80% dan penghuni flat B40/M40 berisiko digantikan kondominium mewah (Feb 2025).
muda_stances.stance_en: MUDA fights policies that displace existing residents: Syed Saddiq branded the Urban Renewal Act a 'House Confiscation Act' over its consent threshold dropping to 80% and B40/M40 flat dwellers risking replacement by luxury condos (Feb 2025).

quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), mengenai Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar
quotes.role_en: Muar MP (MUDA co-founder), on the Urban Renewal Act

muda_stances.stance_bm: Rekod banjir MUDA terdokumentasi: Misi #MariBantu Dis 2021 mengumpul RM2 juta+ daripada 40,000 penderma untuk mangsa banjir 8 negeri — parti Malaysia pertama menerbitkan audit pihak ketiga untuk dana kemanusiaan. Di Parlimen, Syed Saddiq memfailkan usul tergempar darurat iklim (Dis 2022).
muda_stances.stance_en: MUDA's flood record is documented: the Dec 2021 #MariBantu mission raised RM2m+ from 40,000 donors for flood victims across 8 states — the first Malaysian party to publish a third-party audit of humanitarian funds. In Parliament, Syed Saddiq filed an urgent climate-emergency motion (Dec 2022).

quotes.text: Don't wait too long if water levels start to rise. Move to safer areas as soon as possible. Your lives are more valuable than your belongings.

muda_stances.stance_bm: Syed Saddiq mengetuai kritikan terhadap pelaksanaan subsidi RON95 bersasar dalam perbahasan Belanjawan 2025 (Okt 2024): jangan umumkan pemotongan sebelum kumpulan T15 ditakrifkan, kerana rakyat sudah mendengar apa yang bakal hilang.
muda_stances.stance_en: Syed Saddiq led criticism of the targeted RON95 subsidy rollout in the 2025 Budget debate (Oct 2024): don't announce cuts before the T15 group is even defined, because people have already heard what they stand to lose.

quotes.text: This is the problem when we announce first and think later.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), perbahasan Belanjawan 2025

muda_stances.label_bm: SST diperluas, cukai barangan mewah dibatalkan
muda_stances.label_en: SST expansion while the luxury-goods tax was scrapped
muda_stances.stance_bm: Pendirian MUDA: keadilan cukai — kerajaan memperluas SST ke atas barangan dan perkhidmatan harian rakyat, tetapi membatalkan terus Cukai Barangan Bernilai Tinggi (HVGT) ke atas golongan ultra-kaya (Julai 2025). Cukai elit dahulu sebelum membebankan rakyat.
muda_stances.stance_en: MUDA's position: tax fairness — the government expanded SST onto everyday goods and services while completely scrapping the High Value Goods Tax (HVGT) on the ultra-rich (July 2025). Tax the elites before burdening the rakyat.

quotes.text: This is yet another step that shows the hypocrisy of the Madani Government. They once said they wanted to tax the ultra-rich, but the plan to introduce a tax like HVGT has been completely abandoned.
